name: Overstuff
description:
Huge amounts of food and drink fill the target. It receives a full meal's worth of nourishment and must attempt a Fortitude save. A target by this spell takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speed until it's no longer Sickened.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is Sickened 1, but if it spends an action to end the condition, it succeeds automatically.

Failure The target is Sickened 1.

Critical Failure The target is Sickened 2.
